nasb.text: and Azariah the son of Nathan was over the deputies; and Zabud the son of Nathan, a priest, was the king’s friend;

esv.text: Azariah the son of Nathan was over the officers; Zabud the son of Nathan was priest and king’s friend;

cnv.text: 拿單的兒子亞撒利雅作幕僚長；拿單的兒子撒布得作祭司，他也是王的朋友；

ccb.text: 拿单的儿子亚撒利雅掌管吏部；拿单的儿子撒布得祭司做所罗门王的顾问；
